channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: anthropics /claude-plugins-official | Python | N/A
item.description: Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.

item.title: voidzero-dev /vite-plus | Rust | N/A
item.description: Vite+ is the unified toolchain and entry point for web development. It manages your runtime, package manager, and frontend toolchain in one place.

item.title: InsForge /InsForge | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Give agents everything they need to ship fullstack apps. The backend built for agentic development.

item.title: topoteretes /cognee | Python | N/A
item.description: Knowledge Engine for AI Agent Memory in 6 lines of code

item.title: abhigyanpatwari /GitNexus | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

item.title: 666ghj /MiroFish | Python | N/A
item.description: A Simple and Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine, Predicting Anything. 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物

item.title: p-e-w /heretic | Python | N/A
item.description: Fully automatic censorship removal for language models

item.title: obra /superpowers | Shell | N/A
item.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

item.title: shareAI-lab /learn-claude-code | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Bash is all you need - A nano Claude Code–like agent, built from 0 to 1

item.title: volcengine /OpenViking | Python | N/A
item.description: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

item.title: Crosstalk-Solutions /project-nomad | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.

item.title: lightpanda-io /browser | Zig | N/A
item.description: Lightpanda: the headless browser designed for AI and automation
